title: Candid UGC Selfie
description: A candid UGC-style selfie photo of a young Turkish woman caught mid-laugh at her home office desk.

prompt.concept: Candid UGC-style selfie photo. A young Turkish woman in her late 20s caught mid-laugh at her home office desk. Authentic creator energy — not posed, not over-edited. The kind of natural moment that feels like a friend snapped it for her Instagram story.

format.platform_look: Native iPhone front camera, slightly grainy

character.hair: messy bun, slightly loose strands framing the face, natural texture
character.skin: natural skin texture with realistic pores, minimal makeup, slight natural flush from laughing
character.eyes: slightly squinting from a genuine mid-laugh smile (Duchenne smile), warm and crinkled at the corners
character.expression: genuine mid-laugh moment, not posed. Mouth open in a real smile showing some teeth, eyes squinting naturally, head slightly tilted

wardrobe.top: oversized cream knit sweater, soft chunky texture, slightly slouchy on shoulders, no logos

setting.location: warmly lit home office, sitting at a wooden desk by a window
background_details: MacBook screen slightly out of focus showing a content calendar / spreadsheet
a mug of Turkish tea on the desk
a small notebook with handwritten notes
a small green plant in the corner of frame

camera.shot: selfie close-up, face and upper chest, desk visible behind
camera.angle: slightly above eye level (natural selfie arm extension)
camera.lens_feel: iPhone front camera, 1x, slight selfie lens distortion
camera.framing: slightly off-center, casual not perfectly composed

lighting.key: soft natural afternoon daylight from a nearby window

image_quality.grain: slight natural grain, like a real iPhone photo
image_quality.sharpness: soft natural focus on face, gentle background blur (not heavy bokeh)
image_quality.color_grading: warm, slightly desaturated, no heavy filter
image_quality.editing: minimal — no beauty filter, no over-smoothing, no HDR boost

pose_and_moment.body_language: relaxed, leaning slightly toward camera, one shoulder a bit lower, casual posture
pose_and_moment.energy: mid-laugh, candid, caught in a natural happy second
authenticity_markers: real skin with visible texture and minor unevenness
loose hair strands not perfectly placed

no_text_no_graphics.note: Zero text overlays, zero logos, zero watermarks, zero UI elements. Pure clean photo.
